case_title: ALLSTATAE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LEON RAMON et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLSTATAE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMON, LEON $1,456.45 PRINCIPAL, $96.39 INTEREST, $271.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,823.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-31-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
